description: Customizations for alert component - complex nested structure with switch-based icon
notes: Alert has complex nested structure: outer div.rvo-alert > inner div.rvo-alert__container > content
Icon is determined by switch statement on 'kind' prop
Closable button is not supported in Jinja (requires JavaScript state)
Content default changed from example HTML to empty string

class_overrides.primary_classes:
{% set css_classes = ['rvo-alert__container'] %}
{% if maxWidth %}{% set css_classes = css_classes + ['rvo-max-width-layout--' + maxWidth] %}{% endif %}
